title: You Know?
overview: Takuya, a young boy dealing with the death of his father, gets a bizarre letter in the mail. It leads him to the local cliffs, where strange things are happening, and he meets a mysterious girl...

title: Parallel World Constitutive Theorem
overview: Takuya tries to find out what powers his new device has, as well as what its limitations might be. He gets the perfect chance to test it when his mother is attacked...

title: Tears That Can't Be Stopped
overview: Ayumi holds a meeting with the townspeople to discuss the deaths from the lightning strikes. She’s beginning to crack under the pressure of running her job site.

title: Dirtied White Skin
overview: Ayumi is acting strange the day after the meeting with the townspeople. Takuya begins to suspect that something is very wrong.

title: Spiral of Tragedy
overview: The time has come to put the Reflector Device to use. But Takuya will find that it’s harder than he thinks.

title: Beyond a Pale Light
overview: With Ayumi safe, it’s up to Takuya to prove her innocence. He breaks into Geotech with Kaori to get the info he needs.

title: The Cause of the Curse
overview: Takuya goes to deliver his father’s research notes to Ryuzoji’s house, where he realizes that something is very wrong.

title: The Sparrows and Swallows Know Not
overview: Mio is depressed after finding out about her father's corrupt activities. Even worse, he's sending her out of the country…

title: The Distance Between Him and Her
overview: After Mio's father is revealed to be corrupt, her reputation at school is ruined. Before she leaves Japan forever, there's one last thing she wants to do.

title: Feelings Overlapping
overview: Takuya chases Mio into the strange tower that forms Mt. Sankaku. But there's more inside than he knew…

title: That Kiss, Once More
overview: Takuya and Mio are trapped beneath Mt. Sankaku, with Mitsuki hunting them. And at dawn, the lightning will begin to strike…

title: The Secret Under the White Coat
overview: Having saved Mio, Takuya finds himself back where he started. What awaits him this time?

title: An Ordained Fate
overview: Takuya works with Eriko to discover Ryuzoji's secrets. He learns that her past is far different than what he ever suspected…

title: The Transfer Student's Friend
overview: Takuya begins a new time loop. This time, his target is Kanna, who seems to know far more than a transfer student should…

title: A Summer That Won't Come Back
overview: Takuya and his friends head to Mio's private beach to enjoy a fun summer vacation. But suddenly the Reflector Device goes missing…

title: Within Unmoving Time
overview: Kanna is being threatened by Hojo, a private detective working for Ryuzoji. She says goodbye to Takuya, and threatens to leave forever…

title: A Pale, Ephemeral Vow
overview: Posters have gone up on the school bullitin board denouncing Kanna, and she's going to transfer away from the school. Before she goes, Takuya goes to meet with her one last time…

title: Twilight in Dela Granto
overview: Takuya finds himself in the mysterious world of Dela Granto. Alone and far from home, he searches for the psychite to save Kanna.

title: The Bond Between Parent and Child
overview: Takuya and Sayless give birth to a beautiful daughter, Yu-No. But all is not well in his new world

title: Into the Rafaelo Desert
overview: Sayless is killed by guards from the imperial city, and Takuya sets out into the deadly Rafaelo desert to get revenge.

title: The Quarry Where Demons Rule
overview: Takuya is imprisoned in the quarry and forced to mine "holy stones", which appear to be the psychite he seeks. A year passes as he attempts to escape…

title: Escape from the Quarry
overview: Takuya and the resistance try to find a way to escape from their prison, while the day of the ritual draws near.

title: The Imperial City, Where the Wind Blows
overview: The resistance begins its assault on the Divine Emperor's castle, and Takuya reunites with someone he didn't expect to see.

title: The Truth of Dela Granto
overview: Takuya discovers the truth behind the other world of Dela Granto, and the coming disaster.

title: The Promised Ritual
overview: The ritual to save both worlds is held, but is interrupted at the last second by Ryuzoji, who plans to interrupt it so that everything dies.

title: A Girl Who Chants Love at the Bound of This World
overview: The ritual is completed, but Yu-No must pay a heavy price. Will Takuya be there for her?
